editorial.name: Minimalism & Swiss Style
editorial.keywords: Clean, simple, spacious, functional, white space, high contrast, geometric, sans-serif, grid-based, essential
editorial.effects: Subtle hover (200-250ms), smooth transitions, sharp shadows if any, clear type hierarchy, fast loading
editorial.checklist: ☐ Grid-based layout 12-16 columns, ☐ Typography hierarchy clear, ☐ No unnecessary decorations, ☐ WCAG AAA contrast verified, ☐ Mobile responsive grid

editorial.name: Flat Design
editorial.keywords: 2D, minimalist, bold colors, no shadows, clean lines, simple shapes, typography-focused, modern, icon-heavy
editorial.effects: No gradients/shadows, simple hover (color/opacity shift), fast loading, clean transitions (150-200ms ease), minimal icons
editorial.checklist: ☐ No shadows/gradients, ☐ 4-6 solid colors max, ☐ Clean lines consistent, ☐ Simple shapes used, ☐ Icon-heavy layout, ☐ High saturation colors, ☐ Fast loading verified

editorial.name: Zero Interface
editorial.keywords: Minimal visible UI, voice-first, gesture-based, AI-driven, invisible controls, predictive, context-aware, ambient
editorial.effects: Voice recognition UI, gesture detection, AI predictions (smooth reveal), progressive disclosure, smart suggestions
editorial.checklist: ☐ Voice commands responsive, ☐ Gesture detection active, ☐ AI predictions hidden/revealed, ☐ Progressive disclosure working, ☐ Minimal visible UI, ☐ Smart suggestions contextual

modern.name: Minimalism & Swiss Style
modern.keywords: Clean, simple, spacious, functional, white space, high contrast, geometric, sans-serif, grid-based, essential
modern.effects: Subtle hover (200-250ms), smooth transitions, sharp shadows if any, clear type hierarchy, fast loading
modern.checklist: ☐ Grid-based layout 12-16 columns, ☐ Typography hierarchy clear, ☐ No unnecessary decorations, ☐ WCAG AAA contrast verified, ☐ Mobile responsive grid

modern.name: Glassmorphism
modern.keywords: Frosted glass, transparent, blurred background, layered, vibrant background, light source, depth, multi-layer
modern.effects: Backdrop blur (10-20px), subtle border (1px solid rgba white 0.2), light reflection, Z-depth
modern.checklist: ☐ Backdrop-filter blur 10-20px, ☐ Translucent white 15-30% opacity, ☐ Subtle border 1px light, ☐ Vibrant background verified, ☐ Text contrast 4.5:1 checked

modern.name: Vibrant & Block-based
modern.keywords: Bold, energetic, playful, block layout, geometric shapes, high color contrast, duotone, modern, energetic
modern.effects: Large sections (48px+ gaps), animated patterns, bold hover (color shift), scroll-snap, large type (32px+), 200-300ms
modern.checklist: ☐ Block layout with 48px+ gaps, ☐ Large typography 32px+, ☐ 4-6 vibrant colors max, ☐ Animated patterns active, ☐ Scroll-snap enabled, ☐ High contrast verified (7:1+)

premium.name: Dark Mode (OLED)
premium.keywords: Dark theme, low light, high contrast, deep black, midnight blue, eye-friendly, OLED, night mode, power efficient
premium.effects: Minimal glow (text-shadow: 0 0 10px), dark-to-light transitions, low white emission, high readability, visible focus
premium.checklist: ☐ Deep black #000000 or #121212, ☐ Vibrant neon accents used, ☐ Text contrast 7:1+, ☐ Minimal glow effects, ☐ OLED power optimization, ☐ No white (#FFFFFF) background

premium.name: Hero-Centric Design
premium.keywords: Large hero section, compelling headline, high-contrast CTA, product showcase, value proposition, hero image/video, dramatic visual
premium.effects: Smooth scroll reveal, fade-in animations on hero, subtle background parallax, CTA glow/pulse effect
premium.checklist: ☐ Hero section full viewport height, ☐ Headline visible above fold, ☐ CTA button high contrast, ☐ Background image optimized (WebP), ☐ Text readable on background, ☐ Mobile responsive layout

premium.name: Cyberpunk UI
premium.keywords: Neon, dark mode, terminal, HUD, sci-fi, glitch, dystopian, futuristic, matrix, tech noir
premium.effects: Neon glow (text-shadow), glitch animations (skew/offset), scanlines (::before overlay), terminal fonts
premium.checklist: ☐ Dark background only, ☐ Neon accents visible, ☐ Glitch effect subtle, ☐ Scanlines optional, ☐ Monospace font, ☐ Terminal aesthetic

Animation.description: Too many animations cause distraction and motion sickness
Animation.do: Animate 1-2 key elements per view maximum

Animation.description: Animations should feel responsive not sluggish
Animation.dont: Use animations longer than 500ms for UI
Leave UI frozen with no feedback

Animation.description: Hover effects don't work on touch devices
Animation.dont: Rely only on hover for important actions

Touch.description: Small buttons are hard to tap accurately
Adjacent touch targets need adequate spacing
Custom gestures can conflict with system
Touch.do: Avoid horizontal swipe on main content
Use for confirmations and important actions

Layout.description: Stacking context conflicts cause hidden elements
Hidden overflow can clip important content
Layout.do: Test all content fits within containers

Layout.description: Fixed elements can overlap or be inaccessible
Layout.do: Account for safe areas and other fixed elements
Understand what creates new stacking context
Layout.dont: Expect z-index to work across contexts

Layout.description: Layout shift when content loads is jarring
100vh can be problematic on mobile browsers
Layout.do: Use dvh or account for mobile browser chrome

Interaction.description: Keyboard users need visible focus indicators
Interaction.do: Use visible focus rings on interactive elements
Change cursor and add subtle visual change
Interaction.dont: No hover feedback on clickable elements

Interaction.description: Prevent double submission during async actions
Interaction.do: Disable button and show loading state

Interaction.description: Users need to know when something fails
Interaction.do: Show clear error messages near problem
